calls.title: AGRI-BIOCIRCULAR-HUB Open Call
calls.summary: €50,000 lump-sum grants for 12 SMEs and startups in Poland, Latvia and Ukraine piloting bio-circular agriculture solutions (TRL4+) — nutrient recovery, soil health, water-smart farming and related challenge areas.

calls.title: C4B Open Call 2026 — Pilot Projects
calls.budget: Up to €60,000 lump sum per project (€480,000 total)
calls.summary: Funding for pilot projects testing C4B's circular bio-based business models across forestry, agri-food or peatland value chains — open to single applicants or consortia of up to 3 partners across EU and Horizon Europe associated countries.

calls.title: 28DIGITAL Co-Creation Accelerator 2026–2027
calls.summary: For early-stage digital startups at TRL 4–5+ to co-develop and validate solutions with an industry partner through a four-month programme.

calls.title: EIC Accelerator Open 2026
calls.summary: For startups and SMEs bringing a breakthrough innovation from validation to market and international scale.

calls.title: EIC STEP Scale Up 2026
calls.summary: For high-growth European technology companies preparing an investment round of €50 million or more.

calls.title: Common Research Framework for Information Integrity
calls.summary: Build shared research infrastructure and cross-border capacity to understand manipulation, AI-generated content and online information risks.

calls.title: European EdTech Accelerator
calls.summary: Create an EU-wide accelerator that funds and tests European EdTech solutions in real education and training environments.

calls.title: Network of Safer Internet Centres — Geographic Coverage
calls.summary: Funds a single consortium (minimum 3 legal entities from 3 eligible countries) to expand and reinforce the EU's national Safer Internet Centre network, protecting and empowering children online.

calls.title: HEDGE-IoT Open Call 2
calls.summary: Cascade grants up to €60,000 (70% funded) for individual SMEs/startups building IoT-enabled, data-driven energy services across 14 predefined technical topics spanning grid resilience, DER forecasting and dataspace interoperability. No consortia — single applicant only.

calls.title: AI-BOOST AI Challenge Competition
calls.budget: €28,500 Spark Phase prize + up to €100,000 final prize per challenge
calls.summary: Prize competition for teams/startups solving four generative-AI challenges — agricultural robotics, CAD/simulation automation, synthetic clinical datasets and crash-test scenario generation. Spark-Phase winners advance to a 5-month Advance Phase competing for a €100,000 final prize.

calls.title: Enhanced Resilience in Multimodal Passenger Transport Through AI
calls.summary: Funds an Innovation Action piloting generative/discriminative AI to cut passenger delay and speed disruption response across multimodal transport corridors, validated at 3+ pilot sites in different EU Member States. Entities established in China are not eligible.

calls.title: CIVITAS — Sustainable & Smart Urban Mobility Platform
calls.summary: Funds a single consortium to run the next phase of CIVITAS, the EU's urban mobility innovation platform since 2002 — spreading innovative mobility solutions to cities and strengthening the urban mobility stakeholder community.

calls.title: Biocodex Microbiota Foundation International Grant 2026
calls.budget: Up to €200,000/year for up to 3 years (max €600,000) · 100% funded
calls.summary: Up to €600,000 over 3 years for one research project studying diet-microbiome interactions shaping immune function in human disease — requires microbiome analysis, immunophenotyping and a dietary component, with experimental (not purely observational) validation. Not an EU programme — a private research foundation, global eligibility.
